title: How to Set Up and Use SpaceBot (Better Than OpenClaw?)
summary: SpaceBot is an open-source framework designed for building AI agents integrated with community platforms like Discord, Telegram, Slack, Twitch, and WebChat. The tutorial demonstrates Docker installation, model routing for token efficiency, and multi-agent capabilities with features including memory, cron jobs, and platform bindings.
